hero.subtitle: Connect instantly with top-rated mechanics and premium garages nearby. Real-time tracking, transparent pricing, and trusted professionals.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: Three steps to professional vehicle service
howItWorks.step1: Describe your issue and share your location
howItWorks.step2: Get matched with verified mechanics nearby
howItWorks.step3: Track arrival, approve pricing, and pay securely

instantConnect.title: Instant Connect
instantConnect.desc: Get matched with nearby mechanics in seconds, not hours.

liveTracking.title: Live Tracking
liveTracking.desc: Watch your mechanic arrive in real-time on the map.

verifiedPros.title: Verified Pros
verifiedPros.desc: Every mechanic and garage is background-checked and rated.

available247.title: 24/7 Available
available247.desc: Round-the-clock service for emergencies and scheduled repairs.
